subject: Pearly -> Clouded: PR 108 Sonar issue triage
body: Sub-director delegation. Please own the PR 108 Sonar open-issues triage for the quality-gate lane. Current Sonar state: gate ERROR; 20 open issues; 7 HIGH/BLOCKER all security-quality S5443 publicly-writable-directory findings in tests; hotspots reviewed 100 percent; patched tui-app file has issueCount 0. Please produce a concise triage: which findings are real fix candidates, which may be safe/false-positive candidates, exact files/lines, and the smallest implementation order. Read-only unless I route an implementation claim.
